return(function(a,w,T,x,l,s,D,S,o,z,M,B,i,W,v,q,H,X,Q,h,b,R,Z)W,z,q,H,o,b,Z,S,Q,i,M,R,h,v,B,X=function(a,C)local w=X(C)local T=function(T,x,l,s)return i(a,{T,x;l;s},C,w)end return T end,function()S=(635842-635841)+S q[S]=412234+-412233 return S end,{},function(a)q[a]=q[a]-(-35031+35032)if q[a]==225037-225037 then q[a],Z[a]=nil,nil end end,function(a)local ho,zo,Mo,Wo,P,xo,f,Y,Xo,e,D,t,N,n,V,To,y,v,I,E,p,d,oo,q,c,Bo,U,O,r,io,so,So,j,F,lo,Ho,Zo,Do,vo,X,Ro,Qo,S,g,Co,k,G,bo,wo,o,A,K,L,J,u,qo,m,ao while i do if i<6468414-(-1019694)then if i<-816966+4445228 return w(D)end,function(a,C)local w=X(C)local T=function(T,x,l,s,D,Z,q)return i(a,{T,x;l,s;D;Z;q},C,w)end return T end,function(a,C)local w=X(C)local T=function(T,x)return i(a,{T,x},C,w)end return T end,function(a,C)local w=X(C)local T=function()return i(a,{},C,w)end return T end,function(a,C)local w=X(C)local T=function(...)return i(a,{...},C,w)end return T end,function(a,C)local w=X(C)local T=function(T)return i(a,{T},C,w)end return T end,function(a)for C=832579-832578,#a,680622-680621 do q[a[C]]=(-345509-(-345510))+q[a[C]]end if T then local i=T(true)local w=l(i)w[C(362549+-315215)],w[C(-305387-(-352703))],w[C(-550631+597557)]=a,o,function()return-1514352-521901 end return i else return table[C(278171-230970)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
